prompt_summary: Asked LLM to identify a failure mode of the Discovery scoring formula and suggest a fix. Focused on data sparsity and the ghost phrase problem.
llm_output_summary: LLM identified the ghost phrase problem (count=1, total=1 → score=1.0) and proposed Laplacian smoothing as a fix with the modified formula.
modifications_made: Independently implemented the before/after comparison code. Added concrete numerical examples showing the smoothing effect. Created the comparison visualisation.
student_declaration: I declare that this JSON file represents an honest record of the LLM usage for this task. The mathematical properties of Laplacian smoothing were independently verified.
